original_query:
SELECT
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    hd_vehicle_count,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN inventory ON inventory.inv_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND inventory.inv_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    AND inventory.inv_warehouse_sk = web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk
JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN store ON store.s_state = warehouse.w_state
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand >= store_sales.ss_quantity
    AND item.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND item.i_manager_id IN (3, 15, 17, 26, 43, 44, 55, 70, 82, 95)
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('IN', 'LA', 'NE', 'NM', 'OH')
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY cnt;

JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk

original_query:
WITH filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_category, i_manager_id
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Electronics', 'Jewelry', 'Music')
    AND i_manager_id IN (6, 10, 21, 31, 34, 57, 70, 73, 85, 96)
),
filtered_dates_d1 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001
),
filtered_addresses AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_state
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('FL', 'MO', 'PA', 'SC', 'TX')
)
SELECT 
    cd.cd_gender, 
    cd.cd_marital_status, 
    cd.cd_education_status, 
    hd.hd_vehicle_count, 
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM 
    store_sales ss
INNER JOIN filtered_items i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN filtered_dates_d1 d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN inventory inv ON ss.ss_item_sk = inv.inv_item_sk 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = inv.inv_date_sk 
    AND inv.inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss.ss_quantity
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk 
    AND inv.inv_warehouse_sk = ws.ws_warehouse_sk
    AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 31 AND 51
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
    AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
INNER JOIN warehouse w ON ws.ws_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk
INNER JOIN store s ON s.s_state = w.w_state
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk 
    AND ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN filtered_addresses ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
GROUP BY 
    cd.cd_gender, 
    cd.cd_marital_status, 
    cd.cd_education_status, 
    hd.hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY 
    cnt;

original_query:
WITH filtered_store_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk, SR_REFUNDED_CASH
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND sr_return_quantity > 0
      AND sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity BETWEEN 236 AND 295
      AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 28 AND 31
),
customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
           sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
           sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
           SUM(SR_REFUNDED_CASH) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM filtered_store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT ctr_store_sk,
           AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS avg_total
    FROM customer_total_return
    GROUP BY ctr_store_sk
),
filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_current_cdemo_sk
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_month = 5
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1956
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer_total_return ctr1
JOIN store_averages sa ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sa.ctr_store_sk
JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk AND store.s_state IN ('MI', 'NC', 'WI')
JOIN filtered_customers c ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_total
  AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('4 yr Degree', 'College')
  AND cd.cd_gender = 'M'
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT 
        sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
        sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
        sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
        SUM(SR_RETURN_AMT) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM 
        store_returns 
        JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d_year = 2001
        AND sr_return_amt >= 182 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_return_amt <= 241 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 24 AND 27
    GROUP BY 
        sr_customer_sk, 
        sr_store_sk, 
        sr_reason_sk
), 
store_avg_return AS (
    SELECT 
        ctr_store_sk,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS threshold_return
    FROM 
        customer_total_return
    GROUP BY 
        ctr_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id 
FROM 
    customer_total_return ctr1
    JOIN store_avg_return sar ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sar.ctr_store_sk
    JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN customer ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    ctr1.ctr_total_return > sar.threshold_return
    AND store.s_state IN ('IA', 'NE', 'TX') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('S', 'U') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', '4 yr Degree') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_gender = 'F' 
    AND customer.c_birth_month = 6 
    AND customer.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1934 AND 1940 
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id 
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
           sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
           sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
           sum(SR_STORE_CREDIT) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2000
      AND sr_return_quantity > 0
      AND sr_return_amt BETWEEN 107 * sr_return_quantity AND 166 * sr_return_quantity
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT ctr_store_sk,
           AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS avg_total
    FROM customer_total_return
    GROUP BY ctr_store_sk
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer_total_return ctr1
JOIN store_averages sa ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sa.ctr_store_sk
JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN customer ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ctr1.ctr_reason_sk BETWEEN 17 AND 20
  AND store.s_state IN ('MO', 'NC', 'PA')
  AND customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('D', 'W')
  AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('College', 'Unknown')
  AND customer_demographics.cd_gender = 'F'
  AND customer.c_birth_month = 5
  AND customer.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1956 AND 1962
  AND ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_total
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH d1_filtered AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY AS end_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1999
),
item_filtered AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports')
),
hd_filtered AS (
    SELECT hd_demo_sk
    FROM household_demographics
    WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20
    AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
),
ca_filtered AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR')
)
SELECT min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number)
FROM store_returns sr
INNER JOIN d1_filtered d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN store_sales ss ON sr.sr_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
                          AND sr.sr_ticket_number = ss.ss_ticket_number
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price >= 0.80 * ss.ss_list_price
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price <= 1.00 * ss.ss_list_price
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN ca_filtered ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN hd_filtered hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
                        AND sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
                       AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND d1.end_date;

    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1999
),
item_filtered AS NOT MATERIALIZED(
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports')
),
hd_filtered AS NOT MATERIALIZED(
    SELECT hd_demo_sk
    FROM household_demographics
    WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20
    AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
),
ca_filtered AS NOT MATERIALIZED(
    SELECT ca_address_sk
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR')
)
SELECT min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number)
FROM store_returns sr
INNER JOIN d1_filtered d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN store_sales ss ON sr.sr_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
                          AND sr.sr_ticket_number = ss.ss_ticket_number
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price >= 0.80 * ss.ss_list_price
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price <= 1.00 * ss.ss_list_price
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN ca_filtered ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN hd_filtered hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
                        AND sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
                       AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND d1.end_date;

original_query:
SELECT 
    MIN(c_customer_sk), 
    MIN(ss_item_sk), 
    MIN(sr_ticket_number), 
    MIN(ws_order_number) 
FROM store_sales
JOIN store_returns 
    ON store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number 
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
JOIN item 
    ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk 
    AND item.i_category IN ('Home', 'Men', 'Music')
JOIN customer 
    ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_address 
    ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk 
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NC', 'NM', 'OK', 'TN')
JOIN household_demographics 
    ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk 
    AND household_demographics.hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 
    AND household_demographics.hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
JOIN date_dim d1 
    ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk 
    AND d1.d_year = 1999
JOIN web_sales 
    ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk 
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 
    ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
    AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY)
WHERE 
    store_sales.ss_sales_price / store_sales.ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.57 AND 0.77;

WITH valid_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Children', 'Electronics', 'Home')
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 68 AND 77
), 
valid_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1998
      AND d_moy BETWEEN 7 AND 10
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender, 
    cd_marital_status, 
    cd_education_status, 
    count(*) cnt1, 
    cd_purchase_estimate, 
    count(*) cnt2, 
    cd_credit_rating, 
    count(*) cnt3, 
    cd_dep_count, 
    count(*) cnt4, 
    cd_dep_employed_count, 
    count(*) cnt5, 
    cd_dep_college_count, 
    count(*) cnt6
FROM 
    customer c
    JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_county IN ('Benton County','Clarke County','La Paz County','Lexington city','Power County')
    AND c.c_birth_month IN (9, 11)
    AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('D', 'W', 'M')
    AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('Unknown', 'College')
    AND cd.cd_gender = 'F'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM store_sales ss
        JOIN valid_dates ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN valid_items ON ss.ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
        WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ss.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.90 * ss.ss_list_price AND ss.ss_list_price
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
            SELECT ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
            FROM web_sales
            JOIN valid_dates ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            JOIN valid_items ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
            WHERE ws_sales_price BETWEEN 0.90 * ws_list_price AND ws_list_price
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT cs_ship_customer_sk
            FROM catalog_sales
            JOIN valid_dates ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            JOIN valid_items ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
            WHERE cs_sales_price BETWEEN 0.90 * cs_list_price AND cs_list_price
        ) sales
        WHERE sales.customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    )
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
SELECT AVG(ss_quantity),
       AVG(ss_ext_sales_price),
       AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost),
       SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost)
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN customer_demographics ON cd_demo_sk = ss_cdemo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON ss_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
WHERE d_year = 2001
  AND ca_country = 'United States'
  AND (
      (cd_marital_status = 'U' AND cd_education_status = 'College' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00 AND hd_dep_count = 3)
      OR (cd_marital_status = 'W' AND cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
      OR (cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd_education_status = 'College' AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
  )
  AND (
      (ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)
      OR (ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300)
      OR (ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'TX') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250)
  );

WITH filtered_ss AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_quantity, 
           ss.ss_ext_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
           ss.ss_cdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_hdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_addr_sk,
           ss.ss_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001
)
SELECT MIN(ss_quantity) AS min_ss_quantity,
       MIN(ss_ext_sales_price) AS min_ss_ext_sales_price,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost_dup
FROM (
    -- Scenario 1
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'U'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 3
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 2
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 3
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'S'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'TX')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250
) AS combined

SELECT 
    MIN(ss_quantity), 
    MIN(ss_ext_sales_price), 
    MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost), 
    MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) 
FROM 
    store_sales, 
    store, 
    customer_demographics, 
    household_demographics, 
    customer_address, 
    date_dim 
WHERE 
    s_store_sk = ss_store_sk 
    AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk 
    AND d_year = 2001 
    AND (
        (ss_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk 
        AND cd_demo_sk = ss_cdemo_sk 
        AND cd_marital_status = 'S' 
        AND cd_education_status = 'Secondary' 
        AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00 
        AND hd_dep_count = 3) 
        OR 
        (ss_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk 
        AND cd_demo_sk = ss_cdemo_sk 
        AND cd_marital_status = 'S' 
        AND cd_education_status = 'Secondary' 
        AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00 
        AND hd_dep_count = 1) 
        OR 
        (ss_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk 
        AND cd_demo_sk = ss_cdemo_sk 
        AND cd_marital_status = 'S' 
        AND cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree' 
        AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00 
        AND hd_dep_count = 1)
    ) 
    AND (
        (ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk 
        AND ca_country = 'United States' 
        AND ca_state IN ('MS', 'NY', 'VA') 
        AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200) 
        OR 
        (ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk 
        AND ca_country = 'United States' 
        AND ca_state IN ('MS', 'TN', 'TX') 
        AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300) 
        OR 
        (ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk 
        AND ca_country = 'United States' 
        AND ca_state IN ('NC', 'NM', 'OK') 
        AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250)
    );

original_query:
SELECT 
    MIN(ss_quantity) AS min_ss_quantity,
    MIN(ss_ext_sales_price) AS min_ss_ext_sales_price,
    MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
    MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost_duplicate
FROM 
    date_dim
JOIN 
    store_sales ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
JOIN 
    store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN 
    customer_demographics ON cd_demo_sk = ss_cdemo_sk
JOIN 
    household_demographics ON hd_demo_sk = ss_hdemo_sk
JOIN 
    customer_address ON ca_address_sk = ss_addr_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2001
    AND (
        (
            cd_marital_status = 'U' 
            AND cd_education_status = 'College' 
            AND (
                (ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00 AND hd_dep_count = 3)
                OR 
                (ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
            )
        )
        OR 
        (
            cd_marital_status = 'S' 
            AND cd_education_status = 'Secondary' 
            AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00 
            AND hd_dep_count = 1
        )
    )
    AND ca_country = 'United States'
    AND (
        (
            ca_state IN ('AR', 'OK', 'TX') 
            AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200
        )
        OR 
        (
            ca_state IN ('KS', 'MN', 'TX') 
            AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300
        )
        OR 
        (
            ca_state IN ('KS', 'MD', 'NV') 
            AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250
        )
    );

original_query:
WITH cross_items_source AS (
    SELECT iss.i_brand_id AS brand_id, iss.i_class_id AS class_id, iss.i_category_id AS category_id, 'store' AS source
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN item iss ON ss_item_sk = iss.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    WHERE d1.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
      AND iss.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND iss.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ics.i_brand_id, ics.i_class_id, ics.i_category_id, 'catalog' AS source
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN item ics ON cs_item_sk = ics.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE d2.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
      AND ics.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND ics.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
    UNION ALL
    SELECT iws.i_brand_id, iws.i_class_id, iws.i_category_id, 'web' AS source
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN item iws ON ws_item_sk = iws.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON ws_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    WHERE d3.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
      AND iws.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND iws.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
),
cross_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk AS ss_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE (i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id) IN (
        SELECT brand_id, class_id, category_id
        FROM cross_items_source
        GROUP BY brand_id, class_id, category_id
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT source) = 3
    )
    AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
),
avg_sales AS (
    SELECT avg(quantity*list_price) average_sales
    FROM (
        SELECT ss_quantity quantity, ss_list_price list_price
        FROM store_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
          AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
        UNION ALL
        SELECT cs_quantity quantity, cs_list_price list_price
        FROM catalog_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
          AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
        UNION ALL
        SELECT ws_quantity quantity, ws_list_price list_price
        FROM web_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
          AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
    ) x
),
week_seqs AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT d_week_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 1998 AND d_moy = 12 AND d_dom = 13) AS week_seq_1998,
        (SELECT d_week_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 12 AND d_dom = 13) AS week_seq_1999
),
sales_combined AS (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        i.i_brand_id,
        i.i_class_id,
        i.i_category_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1999 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) AS ty_sales,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1999 THEN 1 END) AS ty_number_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1998 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) AS ly_sales,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1998 THEN 1 END) AS ly_number_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    CROSS JOIN week_seqs ws
    WHERE ss.ss_item_sk IN (SELECT ss_item_sk FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
      AND d.d_week_seq IN (ws.week_seq_1998, ws.week_seq_1999)
    GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id
    HAVING 
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1999 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) > (SELECT average_sales FROM avg_sales)
        AND SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1998 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) > (SELECT average_sales FROM avg_sales)
)
SELECT 
    channel AS ty_channel,
    i_brand_id AS ty_brand,
    i_class_id AS ty_class,
    i_category_id AS ty_category,
    ty_sales,
    ty_number_sales,
    channel AS ly_channel,
    i_brand_id AS ly_brand,
    i_class_id AS ly_class,
    i_category_id AS ly_category,
    ly_sales,
    ly_number_sales
FROM sales_combined
ORDER BY channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
LIMIT 100;

WITH cross_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk ss_item_sk
    FROM item,
         (SELECT iss.i_brand_id brand_id,
                 iss.i_class_id class_id,
                 iss.i_category_id category_id
          FROM store_sales,
               item iss,
               date_dim d1
          WHERE ss_item_sk = iss.i_item_sk
            AND ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
            AND d1.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
            AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
            AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
            AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
          INTERSECT
          SELECT ics.i_brand_id,
                 ics.i_class_id,
                 ics.i_category_id
          FROM catalog_sales,
               item ics,
               date_dim d2
          WHERE cs_item_sk = ics.i_item_sk
            AND cs_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk

          FROM web_sales,

               date_dim d3
          WHERE ws_item_sk = iws.i_item_sk
            AND ws_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
            AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
            AND d3.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000) x
    WHERE i_brand_id = brand_id
      AND i_class_id = class_id
      AND i_category_id = category_id
      AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
),

    FROM (SELECT ss_quantity quantity,

          WHERE ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            AND d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000

          UNION ALL
          SELECT cs_quantity quantity,
                 cs_list_price list_price
          FROM catalog_sales,

            AND d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
            AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
          UNION ALL

          FROM web_sales,
               date_dim
          WHERE ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
            AND d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000) x
)

       this_year.i_brand_id ty_brand,

      GROUP BY i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id

     (SELECT 'store' channel,

             i_category_id,
             SUM(ss_quantity * ss_list_price) sales,

        AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
        AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
        AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
      GROUP BY i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id

WHERE this_year.i_brand_id = last_year.i_brand_id

original_query:
SELECT 
    i_item_id, 
    ca_country, 
    ca_state, 
    ca_county, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_quantity AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg1, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_list_price AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg2, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_coupon_amt AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg3, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_sales_price AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg4, 
    AVG(CAST(cs_net_profit AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg5, 
    AVG(CAST(c_birth_year AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS agg6 
FROM 
    catalog_sales, 
    customer_demographics, 
    customer, 
    customer_address, 
    date_dim, 
    item 
WHERE 
    cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk 
    AND cs_item_sk = i_item_sk 
    AND cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk 
    AND cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk 
    AND cd_gender = 'F' 
    AND cd_education_status = 'College' 
    AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk 
    AND d_year = 2001 
    AND c_birth_month = 5 
    AND ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR') 
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 84 AND 89 
    AND i_category = 'Jewelry' 
GROUP BY 
    ROLLUP (i_item_id, ca_country, ca_state, ca_county) 
ORDER BY 
    ca_country, 
    ca_state,

WITH filtered_dates_1 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy = 8 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_dates_2 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy BETWEEN 8 AND 10 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_item_sk, ss_ticket_number, ss_store_sk, ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_item_sk, sr_ticket_number, sr_net_loss
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_catalog AS (
    SELECT cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk, cs_net_profit
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
)
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(fs.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(fr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(fc.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM filtered_sales fs
JOIN filtered_returns fr ON fs.ss_customer_sk = fr.sr_customer_sk
    AND fs.ss_item_sk = fr.sr_item_sk
    AND fs.ss_ticket_number = fr.sr_ticket_number
JOIN filtered_catalog fc ON fr.sr_customer_sk = fc.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND fr.sr_item_sk = fc.cs_item_sk
JOIN store s ON fs.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN item i ON fs.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    MIN(ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    MIN(sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    MIN(cs_agg.min_cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim d1 ON d1.d_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    AND d1.d_moy = 6
    AND d1.d_year = 2002
JOIN item ON item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
JOIN store ON store.s_store_sk = store_sales.ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = store_returns.sr_customer_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
JOIN date_dim d2 ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8
    AND d2.d_year = 2002
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        cs_bill_customer_sk,
        cs_item_sk,
        MIN(cs_net_profit) AS min_cs_net_profit
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
        AND d3.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8
        AND d3.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk
) cs_agg ON store_returns.sr_customer_sk = cs_agg.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND store_returns.sr_item_sk = cs_agg.cs_item_sk
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim d1 ON d1.d_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    AND d1.d_moy = 6
    AND d1.d_year = 2002
JOIN item ON item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
JOIN store ON store.s_store_sk = store_sales.ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = store_returns.sr_customer_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
    AND store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
JOIN date_dim d2 ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 6 AND 8
    AND d2.d_year = 2002
JOIN (
    SELECT

    JOIN date_dim d3 ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk

    GROUP BY cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk

    AND store_returns.sr_item_sk = cs_agg.cs_item_sk

    s_store_name

    s_store_id,

LIMIT 100;

    JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON wr_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001

    GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state, wr_reason_sk

original_query:
WITH ss AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_county,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 1 THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q1_store,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 2 THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q2_store,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 3 THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q3_store
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE i_color IN ('purple', 'sandy')
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 AND 55
      AND ss_list_price BETWEEN 77 AND 91
      AND ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL')
      AND d_year = 2001
      AND d_qoy IN (1, 2, 3)
    GROUP BY ca_county
),
ws AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_county,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 1 THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q1_web,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 2 THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q2_web,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 3 THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q3_web
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON ws_bill_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE i_color IN ('purple', 'sandy')
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 AND 55
      AND ws_list_price BETWEEN 77 AND 91
      AND ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL')
      AND d_year = 2001
      AND d_qoy IN (1, 2, 3)
    GROUP BY ca_county
)
SELECT 
    ss.ca_county,
    2001 AS d_year,
    ws.q2_web / NULLIF(ws.q1_web, 0) AS web_q1_q2_increase,
    ss.q2_store / NULLIF(ss.q1_store, 0) AS store_q1_q2_increase,
    ws.q3_web / NULLIF(ws.q2_web, 0) AS web_q2_q3_increase,
    ss.q3_store / NULLIF(ss.q2_store, 0) AS store_q2_q3_increase
FROM ss
JOIN ws ON ss.ca_county = ws.ca_county
WHERE 
    (ws.q2_web / NULLIF(ws.q1_web, 0)) > (ss.q2_store / NULLIF(ss.q1_store, 0))
    AND (ws.q3_web / NULLIF(ws.q2_web, 0)) > (ss.q3_store / NULLIF(ss.q2_store, 0))
ORDER BY store_q1_q2_increase;

original_query:
WITH avg_discount AS (
  SELECT 
    cs_item_sk, 
    1.3 * avg(cs_ext_discount_amt) as avg_disc
  FROM 
    catalog_sales, 
    date_dim
  WHERE 
    d_date between '1999-01-14' and cast('1999-01-14' as date) + interval '90' day
    AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    AND cs_list_price between 236 and 265
    AND cs_sales_price BETWEEN 0.45 * cs_list_price AND 0.65 * cs_list_price
  GROUP BY 
    cs_item_sk
)
SELECT 
  sum(cs.cs_ext_discount_amt) as "excess discount amount"
FROM 
  catalog_sales cs
  JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  JOIN avg_discount ad ON cs.cs_item_sk = ad.cs_item_sk
WHERE 
  (i.i_manufact_id in (117, 306, 658, 849, 891) or i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 28 and 57)
  AND d.d_date between '1999-01-14' and cast('1999-01-14' as date) + interval '90' day
  AND cs.cs_ext_discount_amt > ad.avg_disc
ORDER BY 
  sum(cs.cs_ext_discount_amt)
LIMIT 100;

WITH filtered_date AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1185 AND 1196
), filtered_customer AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_last_name, c_first_name
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_month IN (2, 3, 10, 12)
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT 
            fc.c_last_name, 
            fc.c_first_name, 
            fd.d_date,
            1 AS sales_source
        FROM store_sales ss
        JOIN filtered_date fd ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = fd.d_date_sk
        JOIN filtered_customer fc ON ss.ss_customer_sk = fc.c_customer_sk
        WHERE ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 28 AND 87
          AND ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DISTINCT 
            fc.c_last_name, 
            fc.c_first_name, 
            fd.d_date,
            2 AS sales_source
        FROM catalog_sales cs
        JOIN filtered_date fd ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = fd.d_date_sk
        JOIN filtered_customer fc ON cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = fc.c_customer_sk
        WHERE cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 28 AND 87
          AND cs.cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DISTINCT 
            fc.c_last_name, 
            fc.c_first_name, 
            fd.d_date,
            3 AS sales_source
        FROM web_sales ws
        JOIN filtered_date fd ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = fd.d_date_sk
        JOIN filtered_customer fc ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = fc.c_customer_sk
        WHERE ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 28 AND 87
          AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
    ) combined_sales
    GROUP BY c_last_name, c_first_name, d_date
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT sales_source) = 3
) hot_cust
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select     w_state   ,i_item_id   ,sum(case when (cast(d_date as date) < cast ('1998-04-26' as date))  		then cs_sales_price - coalesce(cr_refunded_cash,0) else 0 end) as sales_before   ,sum(case when (cast(d_date as date) >= cast ('1998-04-26' as date))  		then cs_sales_price - coalesce(cr_refunded_cash,0) else 0 end) as sales_after  from    catalog_sales left outer join catalog_returns on        (cs_order_number = cr_order_number         and cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk)   ,warehouse   ,item   ,date_dim  where  i_item_sk          = cs_item_sk  and cs_warehouse_sk    = w_warehouse_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk    = d_date_sk  and d_date between  (cast ('1998-04-26' as date) - interval '30' day)                 and (cast ('1998-04-26' as date) + interval '30' day)   and i_category  = 'Home'  and i_manager_id between 28 and 67  and cs_wholesale_cost between 69 and 88  and cr_reason_sk = 11  group by     w_state,i_item_id  order by w_state,i_item_id limit 100;

SELECT 
    w_state,
    i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (CAST(d_date AS DATE) < CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE)) 
        THEN cs_sales_price - COALESCE(cr_refunded_cash, 0) 
        ELSE 0 END) AS sales_before,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (CAST(d_date AS DATE) >= CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE)) 
        THEN cs_sales_price - COALESCE(cr_refunded_cash, 0) 
        ELSE 0 END) AS sales_after
FROM 
    catalog_sales
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
    catalog_returns ON (cs_order_number = cr_order_number AND cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk),
    warehouse,
    item,
    date_dim
WHERE 
    i_item_sk = cs_item_sk
    AND cs_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk
    AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    AND d_date BETWEEN (CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE) - INTERVAL '30' DAY) 
                    AND (CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE) + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND i_category = 'Sports'
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 61 AND 100
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 14 AND 33
    AND cr_reason_sk = 40
GROUP BY 
    w_state, i_item_id
ORDER BY 
    w_state, i_item_id
LIMIT 100;

    AND d_date BETWEEN (CAST('2001-04-07' AS DATE) - INTERVAL '30' DAY)

    AND i_category = 'Sports'
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 61 AND 100
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 14 AND 33
    AND cr_reason_sk = 40

    w_state, i_item_id

    w_state, i_item_id
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
SELECT 
    s.s_store_name,
    s.s_company_id,
    s.s_street_number,
    s.s_street_name,
    s.s_street_type,
    s.s_suite_number,
    s.s_city,
    s.s_county,
    s.s_state,
    s.s_zip,
    sub."30 days",
    sub."31-60 days",
    sub."61-90 days",
    sub."91-120 days",
    sub.">120 days"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        ss_store_sk,
        sum(case when (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 30 ) then 1 else 0 end) as "30 days",
        sum(case when (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 30 and sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 60) then 1 else 0 end) as "31-60 days",
        sum(case when (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 60 and sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 90) then 1 else 0 end) as "61-90 days",
        sum(case when (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 90 and sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 120) then 1 else 0 end) as "91-120 days",
        sum(case when (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 120) then 1 else 0 end) as ">120 days"
    FROM    
        store_sales,
        store_returns,
        date_dim d1,
        date_dim d2 
    WHERE    
        d2.d_year = 2000 
        AND d2.d_moy = 4 
        AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number 
        AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk 
        AND ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk 
        AND sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
        AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk 
        AND d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120' DAY) AND d2.d_date
        AND d1.d_date >= '1999-12-31'::date
        AND d1.d_date <= '2000-04-30'::date
    GROUP BY 
        ss_store_sk
) sub
JOIN store s ON sub.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
ORDER BY 
    s.s_store_name,
    s.s_company_id,
    s.s_street_number,
    s.s_street_name,
    s.s_street_type,
    s.s_suite_number,
    s.s_city,
    s.s_county,
    s.s_state,
    s.s_zip
LIMIT 100;

WITH filtered_returns AS (
    SELECT 
        sr_ticket_number,
        sr_item_sk,
        sr_customer_sk,
        sr_returned_date_sk
    FROM 
        store_returns
    JOIN 
        date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d2.d_year = 2002 AND d2.d_moy = 8
)
SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    s_company_id,
    s_street_number,
    s_street_name,
    s_street_type,
    s_suite_number,
    s_city,
    s_county,
    s_state,
    s_zip,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 30) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "30 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 30 AND sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 60) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "31-60 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 60 AND sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 90) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "61-90 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 90 AND sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk <= 120) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "91-120 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (sr_returned_date_sk - ss_sold_date_sk > 120) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ">120 days"
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    filtered_returns ON 
        ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND 
        ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND 
        ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120' DAY) AND d2.d_date
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name,
    s_company_id,
    s_street_number,

    s_street_type,
    s_suite_number,
    s_city,
    s_county,
    s_state,
    s_zip

WITH filtered_d2 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy = 8
),
filtered_d1 AS (
    SELECT d1.d_date_sk, d1.d_date
    FROM date_dim d1
    JOIN filtered_d2 d2 ON d1.d_date BETWEEN (d2.d_date - INTERVAL '120 days') AND d2.d_date
    WHERE d1.d_dow = 2
),
filtered_stores AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM store
    WHERE s_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'OH')
)
SELECT 
    MIN(s_store_name),
    MIN(s_company_id),
    MIN(s_street_number),
    MIN(s_street_name),
    MIN(s_suite_number),
    MIN(s_city),
    MIN(s_zip),
    MIN(ss_ticket_number),
    MIN(ss_sold_date_sk),
    MIN(sr_returned_date_sk),
    MIN(ss_item_sk),
    MIN(d1.d_date_sk)
FROM filtered_stores s
JOIN store_sales ON s.s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON s.s_store_sk = sr_store_sk
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
    AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
JOIN filtered_d1 d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN filtered_d2 d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk;

original_query:
WITH my_customers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT c_customer_sk, c_current_addr_sk
  FROM (
    SELECT cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
    FROM catalog_sales
    INNER JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    INNER JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE item.i_category = 'Men'
      AND item.i_class = 'accessories'
      AND date_dim.d_moy = 7
      AND date_dim.d_year = 1999
      AND catalog_sales.cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 44 AND 74
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
    FROM web_sales
    INNER JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    INNER JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE item.i_category = 'Men'
      AND item.i_class = 'accessories'
      AND date_dim.d_moy = 7
      AND date_dim.d_year = 1999
      AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 44 AND 74
  ) sales
  INNER JOIN customer ON customer.c_customer_sk = sales.customer_sk
  WHERE customer.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1943 AND 1956
),
date_range AS (
  SELECT d_month_seq + 1 AS start_month, d_month_seq + 3 AS end_month
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 7
  LIMIT 1
),
my_revenue AS (
  SELECT 
    my_customers.c_customer_sk,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM my_customers
  INNER JOIN store_sales ON my_customers.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
  INNER JOIN customer_address ON my_customers.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
  INNER JOIN store ON customer_address.ca_county = store.s_county
    AND customer_address.ca_state = store.s_state
  INNER JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  CROSS JOIN date_range
  WHERE store.s_state IN ('GA','IL','IN','MT','NC','NM','OH','OR','TX','VA')
    AND store_sales.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 44 AND 74
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq BETWEEN date_range.start_month AND date_range.end_month
  GROUP BY my_customers.c_customer_sk
)
SELECT 
  (revenue / 50)::INT AS segment,
  COUNT(*) AS num_customers,
  (revenue / 50)::INT * 50 AS segment_base
FROM my_revenue
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY segment, num_customers
LIMIT 100;

WITH base_date AS (
  SELECT d_month_seq
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 6
  LIMIT 1
), my_customers AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.c_customer_sk, c.c_current_addr_sk
  FROM (
    SELECT cs.cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE i.i_category = 'Sports'
      AND i.i_class = 'camping'
      AND d.d_moy = 6
      AND d.d_year = 2001
      AND cs.cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws.ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
    FROM web_sales ws
    JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE i.i_category = 'Sports'
      AND i.i_class = 'camping'
      AND d.d_moy = 6
      AND d.d_year = 2001
      AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48
  ) sales
  JOIN customer c ON c.c_customer_sk = sales.customer_sk
  WHERE c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1932 AND 1945
), my_revenue AS (
  SELECT mc.c_customer_sk, SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM my_customers mc
  JOIN store_sales ss ON mc.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
  JOIN customer_address ca ON mc.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
  JOIN store s ON ca.ca_county = s.s_county AND ca.ca_state = s.s_state
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  CROSS JOIN base_date b
  WHERE ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 18 AND 48
    AND s.s_state IN ('IA','MD','MO','MS','NE','NY','OK','TN','TX','VA')
    AND d.d_month_seq BETWEEN b.d_month_seq + 1 AND b.d_month_seq + 3
  GROUP BY mc.c_customer_sk
), segments AS (
  SELECT (revenue / 50)::INT AS segment
  FROM my_revenue
)
SELECT segment, COUNT(*) AS num_customers, segment * 50 AS segment_base
FROM segments
GROUP BY segment
ORDER BY segment, num_customers
LIMIT 100;

           cs_item_sk AS item_sk, 
           cs_wholesale_cost AS wholesale_cost
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE item.i_category = 'Electronics'
      AND item.i_class = 'portable'

      AND catalog_sales.cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 70 AND 100
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_sold_date_sk AS sold_date_sk,
           ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
           ws_item_sk AS item_sk,
           ws_wholesale_cost AS wholesale_cost
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE item.i_category = 'Electronics'
      AND item.i_class = 'portable'
      AND date_dim.d_moy = 6
      AND date_dim.d_year = 2002
      AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 70 AND 100
  ) cs_or_ws_sales
  JOIN customer ON customer.c_customer_sk = cs_or_ws_sales.customer_sk
  WHERE customer.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1978 AND 1991
), 
my_revenue AS (
  SELECT c_customer_sk,
         SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS revenue

  JOIN store ON customer_address.ca_county = store.s_county

    AND date_dim.d_month_seq BETWEEN d.base + 1 AND d.base + 3
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk
), 
segments AS (
  SELECT CAST((revenue / 50) AS INT) AS segment
  FROM my_revenue
)

       COUNT(*) AS num_customers, 
       segment * 50 AS segment_base

original_query:
WITH month_seq_dates AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk, d_month_seq
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_month_seq = (
    SELECT d_month_seq
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_date = '1999-02-11'
  )
),
ss_items AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_id AS item_id,
    c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS ss_item_rev
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN month_seq_dates ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  WHERE ss_list_price BETWEEN 269 AND 298
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 28 AND 57
    AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1938 AND 1944
  GROUP BY i_item_id, c_birth_year
),
cs_items AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_id AS item_id,
    c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS cs_item_rev
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN month_seq_dates ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  WHERE cs_list_price BETWEEN 269 AND 298
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 28 AND 57
    AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1938 AND 1944
  GROUP BY i_item_id, c_birth_year
),
ws_items AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_id AS item_id,
    c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS ws_item_rev
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN month_seq_dates ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  WHERE ws_list_price BETWEEN 269 AND 298
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 28 AND 57
    AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1938 AND 1944
  GROUP BY i_item_id, c_birth_year
)
SELECT 
  ss.item_id,
  ss.birth_year,
  ss_item_rev,
  (ss_item_rev / ((ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3)) * 100 AS ss_dev,
  cs_item_rev,
  (cs_item_rev / ((ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3)) * 100 AS cs_dev,
  ws_item_rev,
  (ws_item_rev / ((ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3)) * 100 AS ws_dev,
  (ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3 AS average
FROM ss_items ss
JOIN cs_items cs ON ss.item_id = cs.item_id AND ss.birth_year = cs.birth_year
JOIN ws_items ws ON ss.item_id = ws.item_id AND ss.birth_year = ws.birth_year
WHERE 
  GREATEST(ss_item_rev, cs_item_rev, ws_item_rev) <= 1.1 * LEAST(ss_item_rev, cs_item_rev, ws_item_rev)
ORDER BY ss.item_id, ss.birth_year, ss_item_rev
LIMIT 100;

  JOIN month_seq_dates ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  WHERE ss_list_price BETWEEN 269 AND 298
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 28 AND 57
    AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1938 AND 1944
  GROUP BY i_item_id, c_birth_year
),
cs_items AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_id AS item_id,
    c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS cs_item_rev
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN month_seq_dates ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  WHERE cs_list_price BETWEEN 269 AND 298
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 28 AND 57
    AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1938 AND 1944
  GROUP BY i_item_id, c_birth_year
),
ws_items AS (
  SELECT 
    i_item_id AS item_id,
    c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS ws_item_rev
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN month_seq_dates ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  WHERE ws_list_price BETWEEN 269 AND 298
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 28 AND 57
    AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1938 AND 1944
  GROUP BY i_item_id, c_birth_year
)
SELECT 
  ss.item_id,
  ss.birth_year,
  ss_item_rev,
  (ss_item_rev / ((ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3)) * 100 AS ss_dev,
  cs_item_rev,
  (cs_item_rev / ((ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3)) * 100 AS cs_dev,
  ws_item_rev,
  (ws_item_rev / ((ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3)) * 100 AS ws_dev,
  (ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev) / 3 AS average
FROM ss_items ss
JOIN cs_items cs ON ss.item_id = cs.item_id AND ss.birth_year = cs.birth_year
JOIN ws_items ws ON ss.item_id = ws.item_id AND ss.birth_year = ws.birth_year
WHERE 
  GREATEST(ss_item_rev, cs_item_rev, ws_item_rev) <= 1.1 * LEAST(ss_item_rev, cs_item_rev, ws_item_rev)
ORDER BY ss.item_id, ss.birth_year, ss_item_rev
LIMIT 100;

WITH target_month AS (
  SELECT d_month_seq
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_date = '2001-04-16'
),
target_dates AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_month_seq = (SELECT d_month_seq FROM target_month)
),
sales_data AS (
  SELECT 
    'store' AS channel,
    i.i_item_id AS item_id,
    c.c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN target_dates td ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = td.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
  WHERE ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123
    AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 AND 100
    AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
  GROUP BY i.i_item_id, c.c_birth_year
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    'catalog' AS channel,
    i.i_item_id AS item_id,
    c.c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(cs.cs_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN target_dates td ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = td.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer c ON cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
  WHERE cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123
    AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 AND 100
    AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
  GROUP BY i.i_item_id, c.c_birth_year
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT 
    'web' AS channel,
    i.i_item_id AS item_id,
    c.c_birth_year AS birth_year,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS revenue
  FROM web_sales ws
  JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN target_dates td ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = td.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer c ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
  WHERE ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123
    AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 71 AND 100
    AND c.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1947 AND 1953
  GROUP BY i.i_item_id, c.c_birth_year
),
pivoted_data AS (
  SELECT
    item_id,
    birth_year,
    MAX(CASE WHEN channel = 'store' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END) AS ss_item_rev,
    MAX(CASE WHEN channel = 'catalog' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END) AS cs_item_rev,
    MAX(CASE WHEN channel = 'web' THEN revenue ELSE 0 END) AS ws_item_rev
  FROM sales_data
  GROUP BY item_id, birth_year
),
final_data AS (
  SELECT
    item_id,
    birth_year,
    ss_item_rev,
    cs_item_rev,
    ws_item_rev,
    (ss_item_rev + cs_item_rev + ws_item_rev)/3 AS average
  FROM pivoted_data
  WHERE ss_item_rev > 0 AND cs_item_rev > 0 AND ws_item_rev > 0
    AND ss_item_rev BETWEEN 0.9 * cs_item_rev AND 1.1 * cs_item_rev
    AND ss_item_rev BETWEEN 0.9 * ws_item_rev AND 1.1 * ws_item_rev
    AND cs_item_rev BETWEEN 0.9 * ws_item_rev AND 1.1 * ws_item_rev
)
SELECT
  item_id,
  birth_year,
  ss_item_rev,
  ss_item_rev/average * 100 AS ss_dev,
  cs_item_rev,
  cs_item_rev/average * 100 AS cs_dev,
  ws_item_rev,
  ws_item_rev/average * 100 AS ws_dev,
  average
FROM final_data
ORDER BY item_id, birth_year, ss_item_rev
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH wss AS (
    SELECT 
        d_week_seq, 
        ss_store_sk, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN (d_day_name = 'Sunday') THEN ss_sales_price ELSE NULL END) AS sun_sales, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN (d_day_name = 'Monday') THEN ss_sales_price ELSE NULL END) AS mon_sales, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN (d_day_name = 'Tuesday') THEN ss_sales_price ELSE NULL END) AS tue_sales, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN (d_day_name = 'Wednesday') THEN ss_sales_price ELSE NULL END) AS wed_sales, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN (d_day_name = 'Thursday') THEN ss_sales_price ELSE NULL END) AS thu_sales, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN (d_day_name = 'Friday') THEN ss_sales_price ELSE NULL END) AS fri_sales, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN (d_day_name = 'Saturday') THEN ss_sales_price ELSE NULL END) AS sat_sales
    FROM 
        store_sales, date_dim
    WHERE 
        d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk 
        AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 17 * 0.01 AND 37 * 0.01
    GROUP BY 
        d_week_seq, ss_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    s_store_name1, s_store_id1, d_week_seq1,
    sun_sales1 / sun_sales2, mon_sales1 / mon_sales2,
    tue_sales1 / tue_sales2, wed_sales1 / wed_sales2, thu_sales1 / thu_sales2,
    fri_sales1 / fri_sales2, sat_sales1 / sat_sales2
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            s_store_name AS s_store_name1, wss.d_week_seq AS d_week_seq1,
            s_store_id AS s_store_id1, sun_sales AS sun_sales1,
            mon_sales AS mon_sales1, tue_sales AS tue_sales1,
            wed_sales AS wed_sales1, thu_sales AS thu_sales1,
            fri_sales AS fri_sales1, sat_sales AS sat_sales1
        FROM 
            wss, store, date_dim d
        WHERE 
            d.d_week_seq = wss.d_week_seq 
            AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk 
            AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1207 AND 1207 + 11
            AND s_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR', 'TX')
    ) y,
    (
        SELECT 
            s_store_name AS s_store_name2, wss.d_week_seq AS d_week_seq2,
            s_store_id AS s_store_id2, sun_sales AS sun_sales2,
            mon_sales AS mon_sales2, tue_sales AS tue_sales2,
            wed_sales AS wed_sales2, thu_sales AS thu_sales2,
            fri_sales AS fri_sales2, sat_sales AS sat_sales2
        FROM 
            wss, store, date_dim d
        WHERE 
            d.d_week_seq = wss.d_week_seq 
            AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk 
            AND d_month_seq BETWEEN 1207 + 12 AND 1207 + 23
            AND s_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR', 'TX')
    ) x
WHERE 
    s_store_id1 = s_store_id2
    AND d_week_seq1 = d_week_seq2 - 52
ORDER BY 
    s_store_name1, s_store_id1, d_week_seq1
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
with wss as (
  select 
    d_week_seq,         
    ss_store_sk,         
    sum(case when (d_day_name='Sunday') then ss_sales_price else null end) sun_sales,         
    sum(case when (d_day_name='Monday') then ss_sales_price else null end) mon_sales,         
    sum(case when (d_day_name='Tuesday') then ss_sales_price else null end) tue_sales,         
    sum(case when (d_day_name='Wednesday') then ss_sales_price else null end) wed_sales,         
    sum(case when (d_day_name='Thursday') then ss_sales_price else null end) thu_sales,         
    sum(case when (d_day_name='Friday') then ss_sales_price else null end) fri_sales,         
    sum(case when (d_day_name='Saturday') then ss_sales_price else null end) sat_sales  
  from store_sales,date_dim  
  where d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  
  and ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.80 AND 1.00
  group by d_week_seq,ss_store_sk  
), 
sales AS (
  SELECT 
    s.s_store_name,
    s.s_store_id,
    wss.d_week_seq,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1210 AND 1221 THEN sun_sales END) AS sun_sales1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1210 AND 1221 THEN mon_sales END) AS mon_sales1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1210 AND 1221 THEN tue_sales END) AS tue_sales1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1210 AND 1221 THEN wed_sales END) AS wed_sales1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1210 AND 1221 THEN thu_sales END) AS thu_sales1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1210 AND 1221 THEN fri_sales END) AS fri_sales1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1210 AND 1221 THEN sat_sales END) AS sat_sales1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1222 AND 1233 THEN sun_sales END) AS sun_sales2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1222 AND 1233 THEN mon_sales END) AS mon_sales2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1222 AND 1233 THEN tue_sales END) AS tue_sales2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1222 AND 1233 THEN wed_sales END) AS wed_sales2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1222 AND 1233 THEN thu_sales END) AS thu_sales2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1222 AND 1233 THEN fri_sales END) AS fri_sales2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1222 AND 1233 THEN sat_sales END) AS sat_sales2
  FROM wss
  JOIN store s ON wss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON wss.d_week_seq = d.d_week_seq
  WHERE s.s_state IN ('IA','MS','NE','NY','OK','TN','TX','VA')
  GROUP BY s.s_store_name, s.s_store_id, wss.d_week_seq
)
SELECT 
  s1.s_store_name AS s_store_name1,
  s1.s_store_id AS s_store_id1,
  s1.d_week_seq AS d_week_seq1,
  s1.sun_sales1/NULLIF(s2.sun_sales2, 0) AS sun_ratio,
  s1.mon_sales1/NULLIF(s2.mon_sales2, 0) AS mon_ratio,
  s1.tue_sales1/NULLIF(s2.tue_sales2, 0) AS tue_ratio,
  s1.wed_sales1/NULLIF(s2.wed_sales2, 0) AS wed_ratio,
  s1.thu_sales1/NULLIF(s2.thu_sales2, 0) AS thu_ratio,
  s1.fri_sales1/NULLIF(s2.fri_sales2, 0) AS fri_ratio,
  s1.sat_sales1/NULLIF(s2.sat_sales2, 0) AS sat_ratio
FROM sales s1
JOIN sales s2 
  ON s1.s_store_id = s2.s_store_id 
  AND s1.d_week_seq = s2.d_week_seq - 52
ORDER BY s_store_name1, s_store_id1, d_week_seq1
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH cs_ui AS (
    SELECT cs_item_sk,
           SUM(cs_ext_list_price) AS sale,
           SUM(cr_refunded_cash+cr_reversed_charge+cr_store_credit) AS refund
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN catalog_returns ON cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk AND cs_order_number = cr_order_number
    WHERE cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 65
    GROUP BY cs_item_sk
    HAVING SUM(cs_ext_list_price) > 2*SUM(cr_refunded_cash+cr_reversed_charge+cr_store_credit)
), 
cross_sales AS (
    SELECT i_product_name product_name,
           i_item_sk item_sk,
           s_store_name store_name,
           s_zip store_zip,
           ad1.ca_street_number b_street_number,
           ad1.ca_street_name b_street_name,
           ad1.ca_city b_city,
           ad1.ca_zip b_zip,
           ad2.ca_street_number c_street_number,
           ad2.ca_street_name c_street_name,
           ad2.ca_city c_city,
           ad2.ca_zip c_zip,
           d1.d_year AS syear,
           d2.d_year AS fsyear,
           d3.d_year s2year,
           COUNT(*) cnt,
           SUM(ss_wholesale_cost) s1,
           SUM(ss_list_price) s2,
           SUM(ss_coupon_amt) s3
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN store_returns ON ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    JOIN cs_ui ON ss_item_sk = cs_ui.cs_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd1 ON ss_cdemo_sk = cd1.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd2 ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd2.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd1 ON ss_hdemo_sk = hd1.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd2 ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd2.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN income_band ib1 ON hd1.hd_income_band_sk = ib1.ib_income_band_sk
    JOIN income_band ib2 ON hd2.hd_income_band_sk = ib2.ib_income_band_sk
    JOIN customer_address ad1 ON ss_addr_sk = ad1.ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer_address ad2 ON c_current_addr_sk = ad2.ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON c_first_sales_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON c_first_shipto_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    JOIN promotion ON ss_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
    WHERE d1.d_year IN (2000, 2001)
      AND i_current_price BETWEEN 18 AND 28
      AND p_channel_email = 'N'
      AND p_channel_tv = 'N'
      AND p_channel_radio = 'Y'
      AND ad2.ca_state IN ('NM','OK','TN')
      AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 45 AND 65
      AND cd1.cd_marital_status IN ('U', 'D', 'W')
      AND cd1.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', '4 yr Degree', '2 yr Degree')
      AND cd2.cd_marital_status IN ('U', 'D', 'W')
      AND cd2.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', '4 yr Degree', '2 yr Degree')
      AND cd1.cd_marital_status <> cd2.cd_marital_status
    GROUP BY i_product_name,
             i_item_sk,
             s_store_name,
             s_zip,
             ad1.ca_street_number,
             ad1.ca_street_name,
             ad1.ca_city,
             ad1.ca_zip,
             ad2.ca_street_number,
             ad2.ca_street_name,
             ad2.ca_city,
             ad2.ca_zip,

original_query:
WITH sales_agg AS (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1215 AND 1226
      AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.22 AND 0.32
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk
)
SELECT s_store_name, i_item_desc, sc.revenue, i_current_price, i_wholesale_cost, i_brand
FROM store
JOIN sales_agg sc ON store.s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk
JOIN item ON sc.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, AVG(revenue) AS ave
    FROM sales_agg
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
) sb ON sc.ss_store_sk = sb.ss_store_sk
WHERE sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave
  AND item.i_manager_id BETWEEN 16 AND 20
  AND store.s_state IN ('GA','IL','TX')
ORDER BY s_store_name, i_item_desc
LIMIT 100;

      AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 0.22 AND 0.32

)

JOIN item ON sc.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, AVG(revenue) AS ave
    FROM sales_agg
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk
) sb ON sc.ss_store_sk = sb.ss_store_sk
WHERE sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sb.ave
  AND item.i_manager_id BETWEEN 16 AND 20
  AND store.s_state IN ('GA','IL','TX')
ORDER BY s_store_name, i_item_desc
LIMIT 100;

WITH store_item_revenue AS (
    SELECT 
        ss_store_sk, 
        ss_item_sk, 
        SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue,
        AVG(SUM(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_store_sk) AS avg_revenue_per_store
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1192 AND 1192 + 11
      AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.68 * ss_list_price AND 0.78 * ss_list_price
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk
)
SELECT 
    s.s_store_name,
    i.i_item_desc,
    sir.revenue,
    i.i_current_price,
    i.i_wholesale_cost,
    i.i_brand
FROM store_item_revenue sir
JOIN store s ON sir.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN item i ON sir.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
WHERE sir.revenue <= 0.1 * sir.avg_revenue_per_store
  AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 79 AND 83
  AND s.s_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
ORDER BY s.s_store_name, i.i_item_desc
LIMIT 100;

FROM store
JOIN (
    SELECT ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk, SUM(ss_sales_price) AS revenue,
           AVG(SUM(ss_sales_price)) OVER (PARTITION BY ss_store_sk) AS avg_revenue
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1178 AND 1189
      AND (ss_sales_price / ss_list_price) BETWEEN 0.45 AND 0.55
    GROUP BY ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk
) sc ON store.s_store_sk = sc.ss_store_sk
JOIN item ON item.i_item_sk = sc.ss_item_sk
WHERE sc.revenue <= 0.1 * sc.avg_revenue
  AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 83 AND 87

ORDER BY s_store_name, i_item_desc

original_query:
WITH date_range AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2000
      AND d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 11
),
store_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ss_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_range ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE ss_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
),
web_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ws_bill_customer_sk
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_range ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE ws_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
),
catalog_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cs_ship_customer_sk
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_range ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE cs_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt1,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt2,
    cd_credit_rating,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt3
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
JOIN store_customers sc ON c.c_customer_sk = sc.ss_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN web_customers wc ON c.c_customer_sk = wc.ws_bill_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN catalog_customers cc ON c.c_customer_sk = cc.cs_ship_customer_sk
WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
  AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S', 'M')
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', 'Primary')
  AND wc.ws_bill_customer_sk IS NULL
  AND cc.cs_ship_customer_sk IS NULL
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
LIMIT 100;
rewritten_query:
/*+ HashJoin(cd) */
WITH date_range AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2000
      AND d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 11
),
store_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ss_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_range ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE ss_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
),
web_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ws_bill_customer_sk
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_range ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE ws_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
),
catalog_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cs_ship_customer_sk
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_range ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE cs_list_price BETWEEN 5 AND 94
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt1,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt2,
    cd_credit_rating,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt3
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
JOIN store_customers sc ON c.c_customer_sk = sc.ss_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN web_customers wc ON c.c_customer_sk = wc.ws_bill_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN catalog_customers cc ON c.c_customer_sk = cc.cs_ship_customer_sk
WHERE ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
  AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S', 'M')
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', 'Primary')
  AND wc.ws_bill_customer_sk IS NULL
  AND cc.cs_ship_customer_sk IS NULL
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
LIMIT 100;

original_query:
WITH date_range AS (
  SELECT d_date_sk
  FROM date_dim
  WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy BETWEEN 2 AND 4
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt1,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt2,
    cd_credit_rating,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt3
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NM', 'TN')
    AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S')
    AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('College', 'Advanced Degree')
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM store_sales ss
        JOIN date_range dr ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM web_sales ws
        JOIN date_range dr ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM catalog_sales cs
        JOIN date_range dr ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE cs.cs_ship_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND cs.cs_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating
LIMIT 100;

)

    cd_gender,

JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk

WHERE 
    ca.ca_state IN ('MS', 'NM', 'TN')
    AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'S')

    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1

        JOIN date_range dr ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ss.ss_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM web_sales ws
        JOIN date_range dr ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = dr.d_date_sk
        WHERE ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ws.ws_list_price BETWEEN 211 AND 300
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1

LIMIT 100;
